entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: The presence of aflatoxins in crops and food, which can lead to health issues and economic losses

entities.name: AGRICULTURE EXTENSION OFFICERS
entities.description: Professionals who provide technical knowledge and guidance to farmers to improve agricultural productivity

entities.name: FRONTLINE HEALTH WORKERS
entities.description: Healthcare providers, including care group promoters and health surveillance assistants, who work directly with community members

entities.name: SMALL HOLDER FARMING HOUSEHOLDS
entities.description: Families engaged in small-scale farming activities

entities.name: MALAWI
entities.description: The country where the study on aflatoxin knowledge disparities was conducted

entities.name: NTCHISI DISTRICT
entities.description: A district in Malawi where agriculture extension workers and health workers were surveyed

entities.name: DEDZA
entities.description: A district in Malawi where small holder farming households were surveyed

entities.name: BALAKA
entities.description: A district in Malawi where small holder farming households were surveyed

entities.name: MZIMBA
entities.description: A district in Malawi where small holder farming households were surveyed

entities.name: STRUCTURED QUESTIONNAIRES
entities.description: A data collection tool used to gather information on knowledge and perceptions from respondents

entities.name: FACTOR ANALYSES
entities.description: A statistical method used to identify factors associated with knowledge of aflatoxin contamination

entities.name: DOMESTIC MANAGEMENT OF AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: The practices and knowledge used at the household level to manage and reduce aflatoxin contamination

entities.name: CHILD LINEAR GROWTH
entities.description: A physical growth indicator in children that can be negatively impacted by aflatoxin contamination

entities.name: HEALTH
entities.description: The general physical state of well-being, which can be affected by aflatoxin contamination

entities.name: PRE AND POST-HARVEST PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural activities occurring before and after harvest that can increase the risk of aflatoxin contamination

entities.name: TRADE AND INCOME LOSSES
entities.description: The economic impact resulting from aflatoxin contamination in crops
